visualization.requirement: Grouped bar chart showing minor count distribution by academic division (AS/EN) with drill-down to department level via interaction.
visualization.reason: Heatmap would be sparse due to only 10 minor records. Division-based grouping provides more meaningful patterns while maintaining drill-down capability.

visualization.requirement: Bar chart comparing advisor's primary department division with student minor divisions, aggregated by academic division pairs.
visualization.reason: Scatter plot would suffer from low data density (only 10 minors). Division-level comparison better reveals mentorship patterns.

data.requirement: Enhance department mapping to include academic divisions (AS/EN) for both major and minor associations.
data.reason: Enables higher-level grouping to overcome sparsity issues in minor data analysis.
